title: EccKey::create: two identical flush-on-error map_err blocks for SRK
description: key.rs lines 78-83 and 101-107 have byte-for-byte identical map_err blocks that flush srk on error. Extract a local closure: 'let flush_srk_on_err = |e| { unsafe { wolfTPM2_UnloadHandle(dev_ptr, &mut srk.handle as *mut _); } e };' then use .map_err(flush_srk_on_err)?. Reduces two identical unsafe blocks to one.
